question: 2025年6月15日当天的GMV和订单数是多少
sql: SELECT stat_date, order_count, gmv FROM ads_order_daily WHERE stat_date = '2025-06-15' LIMIT 1
title: 当日核心指标

question: 展示近30天GMV趋势折线图
sql: SELECT stat_date, gmv, order_count FROM ads_order_daily WHERE stat_date >= DATE_SUB('2025-06-15', INTERVAL 29 DAY) AND stat_date <= '2025-06-15' ORDER BY stat_date LIMIT 500
title: 近30日GMV趋势

question: 2025-06-15转化漏斗各阶段人数
sql: SELECT pv_count, click_count, cart_count, fav_count, order_event_count FROM ads_funnel_daily WHERE stat_date = '2025-06-15' LIMIT 1
title: 转化漏斗

question: 当日UV和PV是多少
sql: SELECT uv, pv, active_member_count FROM ads_member_active WHERE stat_date = '2025-06-15' LIMIT 1
title: 当日活跃

question: 地域销售TOP5省份
sql: SELECT province, order_count, gmv FROM ads_region_sales WHERE stat_date = '2025-06-15' ORDER BY gmv DESC LIMIT 5
title: 地域销售TOP5

question: 热销商品TOP10
sql: SELECT product_name, order_count, gmv FROM ads_product_top WHERE stat_date = '2025-06-15' ORDER BY rank_num LIMIT 10
title: 热销商品TOP10

question: 6月15日24小时销售额曲线
sql: SELECT stat_hour, gmv, order_count FROM ads_order_hourly WHERE stat_date = '2025-06-15' ORDER BY stat_hour LIMIT 24
title: 24小时销售曲线

question: 订单状态分布
sql: SELECT status_name, order_count FROM ads_order_status WHERE stat_date = '2025-06-15' ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 10
title: 订单状态分布
